sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import ctl from "@netlify/classnames-template-literals"; import { Tab, Tabs, TabList, TabPanel } from 'react-tabs'; import ReactHtmlParser from 'react-html-parser'; import axios from 'axios'; let productData = null; const tabClasses = ctl(` text-gray-600 py-2 px-6 my-5 block hover:text-indigo-500 focus:outline-none text-indigo-900 border-b-2 font-bold border-blue-900 `) function Product(props){ const [product, setProduct] = useState(null) useEffect(() => { if(Object.is(productData, null)){ axios.get(`https://api-test.innoloft.com/product/6781/`).then(res => { productData = res.data; setProduct(productData) }).catch(err => console.log(err)) } }) return (

{product?.name}

{product?.type.name}

{/* image description tab - attributes tab (editable) tab content */} Description Attributes
{ReactHtmlParser(product?.description)}

Any content 2

{product?.user.firstName + ' ' + product?.user.lastName}

{product?.company.name}

Company Location:
